files_not_touched_by_design: engine/catalog/catalog.go (existing striped-mutex convention reused, not modified)
blast_radius: engine/catalog package only; ContentStore.Append signature unchanged (still (bool, error)); no caller-visible API change, only internal serialization added. No regression risk to Create/Read call sites.
risk_if_not_fixed: Silent lost-update data corruption for any concurrent same-fileID Append callers (e.g. multiple agents/goroutines appending to the same topic file), with catalog SizeBytes reporting the corrupted length and no error surfaced -- exactly the highest-risk correctness surface docs/LLD/split.md flags for this module.
risk_of_fix: Low: reuses an existing, already-tested locking convention (Catalog.stripes/stripeFor) rather than inventing new synchronization; independent stripes array avoids reentrant-lock deadlock risk from cs.cat.Put's internal locking.
